title: Large language models for systematic review screening
abstract: This systematic review studies large language models for abstract screening, evidence synthesis, and PRISMA-aligned workflows in systematic literature reviews.

title: PRISMA methods for reproducible review automation
abstract: This paper proposes reproducible pipelines, modular code, and structured metadata storage for systematic review automation.

title: Information retrieval ranking for evidence discovery
abstract: We benchmark retrieval and ranking methods for scholarly search, relevance scoring, and literature triage.

title: Clinical evidence synthesis with LLM-assisted screening
abstract: A case study on biomedical review screening with large language models, citation snowballing, and inclusion decisions.

title: Unrelated crop irrigation optimization study
abstract: This agricultural optimization paper studies irrigation decisions and plant growth prediction.
